headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Buy Rating on Entergy (ETR) Stock
summary: Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) is one of the Best Conservative Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 17, analyst Neil Kalton of Wells Fargo maintained a “Buy” rating on the company’s stock, with a price objective of $119.00. The rating is backed by the factors that hint at durable earnings growth and undervaluation. The analyst noted the views of […]

headline: Here's Why You Should Add PCG Stock to Your Portfolio Right Now
summary: PG&E's steady infrastructure investments, renewable expansion and strong earnings growth outlook position the utility stock as a compelling portfolio addition.
